messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0122",
  "title": "理想主义底色下的“不着急”与长线定力",
  "page_index": 35,
  "page_range": "35"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0123",
    "title": "数据趋势分析：",
    "page_range": "35",
    "summary": "This section provides a quantitative data trend analysis of approximate monthly revenue (in 万元) for six game titles across a full calendar year (January–December). It enables retrieval of answers to questions regarding: **Topics & Metrics**: Month-by-month financial performance, revenue ranges, and fluctuation patterns. **Entities**: 心动小镇, 出发吧麦芬, 伊瑟, 火炬之光：无限, 香肠派对, and 仙境传说M. **Dates**: Specific monthly values from January through December (exact calendar year unspecified). **Claims & Comparisons**: Identification of peak and low-revenue months per title, stability trends, and cross-game revenue comparisons for any given month. **Evidence Type & Structure**: Structured quantitative financial data presented in a list format, optimized for direct tabular extraction or time-series querying. All figures are explicitly noted as approximate."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0124",
    "title": "主要信息：",
    "page_range": "35-1",
    "summary": "This section answers questions regarding monthly revenue trends and market performance for six mobile titles: 心动小镇, 出发吧麦芬, 伊瑟, 火炬之光：无限, 香肠派对, and 仙境传说M. It provides specific metrics in RMB (万元) across key timeframes (January, April, July, September, October, post-October, and full-year periods), supporting claims about distinct performance trajectories: 心动小镇 peaked in July (~29M) then declined; 出发吧麦芬 and 香肠派对 started strong but dropped to negligible levels after October; 伊瑟 surged in September (17M) and October (30M); 火炬之光：无限 spiked in April (17M) and October (28M); and 仙境传说M remained stable year-round (~1M). The data is visualized in a line chart tracking monthly sales/performance and seasonal fluctuations, with evidence sourced from independent research by Diandian Data (点点数据)."
  }
]

message.content: This section provides a quantitative analysis of monthly revenue trends and market performance for six mobile game titles, contextualized within a strategic framework of long-term operational patience. **Topics & Claims:** Examines month-by-month financial performance, revenue fluctuation patterns, peak/low identification, stability trends, and cross-game comparisons. Key claims detail distinct performance trajectories: 心动小镇 peaked in July (~29M) before declining; 出发吧麦芬 and 香肠派对 started strong but dropped to negligible levels post-October; 伊瑟 surged in September (17M) and October (30M); 火炬之光：无限 spiked in April (17M) and October (28M); and 仙境传说M maintained stable year-round performance (~1M). **Entities:** 心动小镇, 出发吧麦芬, 伊瑟, 火炬之光：无限, 香肠派对, 仙境传说M. **Dates:** Full calendar year (January–December), with specific analytical focus on January, April, July, September, October, and post-October periods. **Metrics:** Approximate monthly revenue measured in RMB (万元). **Figures & Evidence Types:** Features a line chart visualizing monthly sales/performance and seasonal fluctuations. Data is presented in a structured list/tabular format optimized for time-series querying and direct extraction, sourced from independent research by Diandian Data (点点数据). All financial figures are explicitly noted as approximate.

     - Metrics: Approximate monthly revenue (in 万元/RMB).
     - Evidence Type/Structure: Structured quantitative financial data in list format, optimized for tabular extraction/time-series querying. Figures noted as approximate.
   - *Child 0124:*
     - Topics: Monthly revenue trends, market performance, distinct performance trajectories, seasonal fluctuations.
     - Entities: Same six games.
     - Dates: January, April, July, September, October, post-October, full-year periods.
     - Metrics: Revenue in RMB (万元). Specific values: 心动小镇 (~29M in July), 伊瑟 (17M in Sep, 30M in Oct), 火炬之光：无限 (17M in Apr, 28M in Oct), 仙境传说M (~1M stable), others dropped to negligible post-Oct.
     - Figures: Line chart tracking monthly sales/performance and seasonal fluctuations.
     - Evidence Type/Source: Independent research by Diandian Data (点点数据).

3.  **Synthesize & Structure for Retrieval:**
   - Need to combine both child summaries into a cohesive parent summary.
   - Must explicitly cover: Topics, Entities, Dates, Tables/Figures, Definitions/Procedures (none visible), Claims, Metrics, Evidence Types.

   This section analyzes the monthly revenue trends and market performance of six mobile game titles under the theme of long-term strategic patience. It covers:

Claims highlight distinct trajectories: 心动小镇 peaked in July before declining; 出发吧麦芬 and 香肠派对 started strong but fell to negligible levels post-October; 伊瑟 surged in September and October; 火炬之光：无限 spiked in April and October; and 仙境传说M maintained stable year-round performance.
   - **Entities:** 心动小镇, 出发吧麦芬, 伊瑟, 火炬之光：无限, 香肠派对, 仙境传说M.
   - **Dates & Timeframes:** Full calendar year (January–December), with specific focus on January, April, July, September, October, and post-October periods.
   - **Metrics:** Approximate monthly revenue in RMB (万元), with specific values cited (e.g., ~29M, 17M, 30M, 28M, ~1M).
   - **Figures & Evidence Types:** A line chart visualizes monthly sales/performance and seasonal fluctuations. Data is presented in structured list/tabular format for time-series querying, sourced from independent research by Diandian Data (点点数据). All figures are explicitly noted as approximate.

I should stick to the exact phrasing from the prompt: "approximate monthly revenue (in 万元)" and cite the specific values as given (~29M, 17M, 30M, 28M, ~1M) to avoid conversion errors. I'll note the unit as 万元 (RMB).
